generated.about.championAnalyticsDesc: See which champions win, get picked or banned, and which talents, cards, and skins players use.
generated.about.cheaterTrackedBody: See community reports and unusual activity that may be worth reviewing. These are not official Hi-Rez bans.
generated.about.counterPickDesc: See how champions have performed against each other in tracked matches. Use it as a guide, not a promise.
generated.about.dataScatteredBody: Player profiles, matches, maps, items, builds, and community guides are spread across the game. PaladinsCat brings them together so they are easier to find and understand.
generated.about.discordCompanionBody: Use Discord commands to look up players, matches, live lobbies, champions, builds, maps, teams, and items.
generated.about.exceptThisPersonAndMaybe: PaladinsCat is for players, analysts, creators, moderators, and anyone who is curious about the game. An account lets you link your profile, join community discussions, get notifications, save preferences, and use custom wallpapers.
generated.about.featureTitle: Everything you need to understand the game
generated.about.gutFeelingBody: Stats include helpful details, such as match count and rank range, so you can understand what each number really means.
generated.about.leaderboardsDesc: Find top players, compare ranked ratings, and explore performance by role.
generated.about.metaTrendsDesc: Explore what players are picking, banning, buying, and building across ranks, maps, regions, and platforms.
generated.about.oldPlatformsBody: Built for Paladins today, with current queues, rankings, mobile-friendly pages, and tools that work on the web and in Discord.
generated.about.paladinscatIsACommunityD: PaladinsCat brings the most useful parts of Paladins into one place. Look up players, review matches, compare champions, explore builds and maps, and share results with friends on Discord.
generated.about.paladinscatIsAFanMadePro: PaladinsCat is an independent, fan-made service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by Hi-Rez Studios. PALADINS and related names, characters, images, and assets belong to Hi-Rez Studios. Public game data is obtained through Hi-Rez services and may be delayed, incomplete, or unavailable.
generated.about.platformSummary: One platform. Every angle of the Realm.
generated.about.playerProfilesDesc: Search by player name or ID to view a public profile and match history. If it is missing or old, request a fresh check from Hi-Rez.
generated.about.principlesTitle: Made to be useful, clear, and honest
generated.about.rankedGrindBody: See how champions perform around your rank instead of comparing every player to one broad average.
generated.about.statsCompareBody: Compare damage, healing, shielding, KDA, and credits with other players and roles.
generated.about.theCompetitiveStatsPlatf: A community-made home for Paladins players who want clear answers, useful stats, and a better view of every match.
generated.about.thinkOfItAsYourPersonalP: Whether you are checking a recent match, learning a champion, or following the wider game, PaladinsCat turns information into clear pages that are easy to explore and share.

generated.privacy.anonymousAnalytics: We may collect anonymous analytics data to improve the service.
generated.privacy.bodyAnalytics: We may collect anonymous analytics data to improve the service. This data is never sold or shared with third-party advertisers.
generated.privacy.bodyChildren: PaladinsCat is not directed to children under 13, and children under 13 must not create an account or submit personal information. If you believe a child under 13 has provided personal information, contact PaladinsCat so the report can be reviewed and eligible data removed.
generated.privacy.bodyContact: Privacy questions or requests can be sent through the PaladinsCat
generated.privacy.bodyCookies: PaladinsCat uses a locale cookie and browser storage for the signed-in session, cached translations and results, interface preferences, and a random first-party analytics identifier. Custom wallpaper uploads are stored locally in IndexedDB on the device that added them; wallpaper URLs and small references are stored locally. Loading an external wallpaper, media embed, font, Discord page, or other external link may send a request to that provider. Browser Do Not Track set to '1' disables PaladinsCat traffic measurement.
generated.privacy.bodyDataCollection: PaladinsCat processes account details you provide (username, email address, password-derived verification data, and optional avatar URL, bio, time zone, or linked player); content and actions you submit (posts, comments, builds, tier lists, likes, reports, and notifications); public Paladins profile and match data retrieved from Hi-Rez services; and operational records needed to run and protect the service. Anonymous traffic measurement uses a random browser identifier that is transformed into a date-specific salted hash before storage together with normalized public page paths and visit times. The raw identifier is not stored in the analytics database.
generated.privacy.bodyHowWeUseYourInform: Information is used to authenticate accounts, maintain sessions, link verified player profiles, provide preferences and notifications, publish community content, calculate and display game statistics, respond to explicit searches and refreshes, prevent abuse, troubleshoot outages, measure aggregate traffic, and improve PaladinsCat. Personal information is not sold. PaladinsCat does not currently use third-party behavioral analytics or advertising pixels.
generated.privacy.bodyInformationWeColle: PaladinsCat processes account details you provide, community content and actions you submit, public Paladins profile and match data retrieved from Hi-Rez services, and limited operational records needed to run and protect the service. Anonymous traffic measurement uses a random browser identifier that is transformed into a date-specific salted hash before storage with normalized public page paths and visit times; the raw identifier is not stored in the analytics database.
generated.privacy.bodyDataRetention: Authentication sessions expire after 72 hours unless ended sooner. Account records, community content, moderation and security records, and public game data may be kept while needed to provide the service, preserve history and data integrity, resolve disputes, prevent abuse, or meet legal obligations. Daily analytics hashes are intentionally separated by date, but aggregate traffic records may be retained. Browser-local data remains until you remove it, clear site storage, or uninstall the browser profile. Retention periods vary by record type and operational need; contact PaladinsCat to request deletion of eligible account data.
generated.privacy.bodyPolicyUpdates: This policy may change as PaladinsCat's features, infrastructure, or legal obligations change. The effective date above will be updated, and material changes may also be announced through the site or account notifications when practical. Review this page periodically.
generated.privacy.bodySecurity: PaladinsCat uses encrypted transport where deployed, salted password-derived verification records, hashed server-side session tokens, access controls, validation, and rate limiting. The active session token is stored in your browser so the site can authenticate requests. No internet service can guarantee absolute security; protect your device and credentials and report suspected compromise promptly.
generated.privacy.bodyThirdParty: Public game data comes from Hi-Rez services. The Discord application operates within Discord and uses application-command interactions. Community posts may contain YouTube, Vimeo, or other external links; custom wallpapers can load from user-selected hosts; and the interface may request fonts from Google. Those providers process requests under their own terms and privacy policies. PaladinsCat does not control their systems.
generated.privacy.bodyUserRights: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, or objection regarding eligible personal information. Account profile fields and player links can be managed through account settings where available. Other requests can be submitted through the contact method below and may require reasonable identity verification. Requests may be limited where data must be retained for security, legal, integrity, or public-record purposes.
generated.privacy.heroIntro: This policy describes the information PaladinsCat processes across the website, registered accounts, community features, anonymous traffic measurement, and Discord application.
generated.privacy.paladinscatIsAFanMadeP: PaladinsCat is an independent, fan-made service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by Hi-Rez Studios. PALADINS and related names, characters, images, and assets belong to Hi-Rez Studios. Public game data is obtained through Hi-Rez services and may be delayed, incomplete, or unavailable.

generated.stats.startingCreditsAreRemove: Starting credits are removed so the metric reflects active credit generation. Longer participation, eliminations, objective play, and other credit-producing actions raise eCPM. Only complete ranked match facts with valid players and more than two minutes played enter these baselines.

generated.stats.theseAreFixedDetectionTh: These are fixed detection thresholds. The role and global percentiles describe the current player base; changing the global lobby-tier selection recalculates this page for that tier range.
generated.stats.tierDistributionsWillApp: Tier distributions will appear after ranked profiles and matches are processed.
generated.stats.topPurchasedItemAppearan: Top purchased item appearances grouped by item class. Expand any item to compare its win rate on other ranked maps.
generated.stats.whiskersShowP10P90TheBox: Whiskers show P10–P90, the box shows P25–P75, and the marker is the average.
generated.terms.bodyAcceptanceOfTerms: By accessing or using PaladinsCat, you agree to these Terms of Use. Do not use the service if you do not agree.

generated.terms.bodyTermination: PaladinsCat may remove content, restrict features, suspend accounts, preserve relevant evidence, or discontinue service when reasonably necessary to protect users, enforce these terms, address security or legal concerns, or maintain the project. PaladinsCat moderation labels and decisions apply only to this service and do not represent an official Hi-Rez ban or game-enforcement action.
generated.terms.bodyThirdPartyServices: PaladinsCat relies on or links to services operated by others, including Hi-Rez Studios, Discord, external media hosts, font providers, and user-supplied wallpaper hosts. Their services, availability, content, and privacy practices are governed by their own terms. PaladinsCat is not responsible for third-party outages, decisions, or content.
generated.terms.bodyUseOfTheService: PaladinsCat provides community-built statistics, cached public player profiles, match and meta analysis, community features, and Discord application commands for Paladins. Results are informational, may reflect incomplete or delayed samples, and are not official Hi-Rez records, competitive rulings, anti-cheat findings, or professional advice. You may not disrupt, scrape abusively, reverse engineer restricted systems, evade rate limits, automate harmful traffic, or use the service unlawfully.
generated.terms.bodyUserAccounts: You are responsible for the accuracy of your registration information, the security of your credentials and devices, and activity performed through your session. Do not share access tokens, impersonate another person, claim a player profile you do not control, or attempt to access another account. Notify PaladinsCat promptly if you believe your account has been compromised.
generated.terms.bodyUserContent: You retain ownership of eligible content you submit, including posts, comments, builds, and tier lists. You grant PaladinsCat a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, reproduce, format, display, and distribute that content only as needed to operate and promote the service. You must have the right to post it. Harassment, hate, threats, personal data shared without permission, cheating tools, knowingly false accusations, spam, infringement, and unlawful content are prohibited.
